---
title: "make_square_affine"
generated: true
description: "Promote an affine to homogeneous square form."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.geometry.affine`](../nitrix-geometry-affine.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:make_square_affine -->
```python
make_square_affine(mat: Float[Array, '... n np1']) -> Float[Array, '... np1 np1']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:make_square_affine -->
Promote an affine to homogeneous square form.

Appends the implied bottom row $(0, \ldots, 0, 1)$ so an
`(..., N, N+1)` affine becomes an `(..., N+1, N+1)` matrix suitable
for matrix multiplication and inversion.  A no-op if `mat` is already
square.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:make_square_affine -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `mat` | `Float` | `...` × `n` × `np1` | — | Batched affine matrices in `(..., N, N+1)` form (or already square `(..., N+1, N+1)`). |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `...` × `np1` × `np1`. Batched square homogeneous matrices `(..., N+1, N+1)`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:make_square_affine -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `n` | query points, each an `ndim`-vector coordinate (variadic) |
| `np1` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
